resultList.dtldesc: Enter a world of sophistication with this 3 BHK flat for sale at Jains Ashraya Apartments Phase 1, West KK Nagar, Chennai. Soaked in morning sunlight, this east-facing apartment is Vaastu approved, ensuring happiness and positivity. Indulge in a life of luxury and style with this stunning flat that is unmatchedNote- Since this is an old house above 20 years the society has already begun the renovation work.Property SpecificationsWelcome to this beautiful 3 BHK flat in Jains Ashraya Apartments with a spacious super built-up area of 1515 square feet. On the 3rd floor of a well-managed building spread over 4 floors, this semi-furnished home comes complete with basic amenities like teak cupboards in all bedrooms and western fittings in bathrooms.The flat has three bedrooms, each designed for rest. The master bedroom measures 16x14 feet and has additional storage on lofts. Two bathrooms are attached, and one is common, with a geyser in one bathroom for your convenience. The luxury of one balcony, attached to a bedroom, overlooking the main road, park, and temple, offers a cozy outdoor area.The dining cum living space is meant for entertainment and relaxation, and the modular kitchen is fully equipped with wooden cabinets and an attached utility area that adds to the functionality. The floors are lined with luxurious vitrified tiles to create a stylish finish throughout the house.FacilitiesThis property boasts wonderful amenities, including one covered car parking space, 24-hour water supply, and 100 power backup for hassle-free living. Safety is a concern, with the presence of a security guard, CCTVs for monitoring, and one lift accessible to your floor. In addition, the building has facilities like clubhouse, gymnasium, swimming pool, walking track, community hall, and garden.LocalityWest KK Nagar offers a peaceful mix of quiet residential living and the convenience of the city, and hence is a preference among professionals and families alike. The locality is well-served by public transportation with easy connectivity to main roads and highways. Good schools, hospitals, supermarkets, banks, and daily conveniences are all easily accessible, promising a comfortable and convenient lifestyle.
